strengths: 20 years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets the 15-year minimum with meaningful breadth
Founded and sustains GISCollective (2016–present), demonstrating product ownership, open-source leadership, and entrepreneurial execution within a technical domain
Recent hands-on AI infrastructure work at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) shows current relevance to the AI builder requirement
concerns: AI expertise is 2 months old and described at the tooling/framework level — no demonstrated AI product or platform built at scale, which is a core preferred qualification
Current and recent titles (Senior/Staff Software Developer) sit well below the Director-level IC seniority the role targets; no evidence of org-level technical strategy or executive influence

No record of advising strategic customers or partners, delivering keynotes, publishing research, or shaping external AI adoption — the role's primary external-facing responsibilities are entirely absent
response.justification: The role demands a Director-level IC who has already built recognized AI products or platforms, can advise C-suite customers on cloud and AI strategy, and inspires internal and external audiences at scale. Bogdan is a capable, broad-based senior engineer with 20 years of experience and an entrepreneurial streak (GISCollective), but his AI exposure is limited to 2 months of tooling work at a current employer, his career trajectory plateaus at Staff/Senior, and there is no evidence of strategic advisory engagements, published AI thought leadership, or the executive-facing influence this principal-level role requires. The gap between his current profile and the role's minimum bar for AI depth and seniority is too wide to bridge with adjacent experience alone.
